text: Bitcoin's 1.6% decline paired with Ethereum's smaller 0.3% drop shows Bitcoin absorbing most of the selling pressure while altcoins show relative resilience, though the gap is narrow. Extreme Fear sentiment (15) and Bitcoin's rising dominance to 55.3% suggest risk-off positioning, with traders rotating into the largest asset despite the 24-hour weakness. Volume at $78B is moderate, indicating the pullback lacks panic-selling conviction, leaving the market in a vulnerable but not capitulating state.
